forecast-period.text: A cold front in the Bight will move across the south of SA during Saturday followed by a weaker front on Monday. A high pressure system centred near southern WA will begin to dominate the weather pattern across SA mid next week.
Wind and wave forecasts are averages. Wind gusts can be 40 per cent stronger than the forecast, and stronger still in squalls and thunderstorms. Maximum waves can be twice the forecast height.
For latest warnings go to www.bom.gov.au, subscribe to RSS feeds, call 1300 659 210* or listen for warnings on relevant TV and radio broadcasts.
* Calls to 1300 numbers cost around 27.5c incl. GST, higher from mobiles or public phones. Marine forecasts are also available on VHF and HF radio. View the radio schedule on www.bom.gov.au/marine
Check the latest Coastal Waters Forecasts for information on wind, wave and weather conditions for neighbouring coastal zones.

area.description: Lower South East Coast: Cape Jaffa to SA-VIC Border

forecast-period.warning-summary: Strong Wind Warning for Friday for Lower South East Coast
forecast-period.text: Northerly 15 to 20 knots, reaching up to 30 knots offshore.
1.5 metres, increasing to 1.5 to 2 metres south of Beachport.
Southwesterly 2.5 metres.
Cloudy. 60% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm offshore.

forecast-period.warning-summary: Gale Warning for Saturday for Lower South East Coast
forecast-period.text: Northerly 20 to 30 knots, reaching up to 40 knots during the day. Winds turning westerly 25 to 30 knots in the morning.
2 to 3 metres, increasing to 2.5 to 4 metres during the morning.
West to southwesterly 2 to 3 metres inshore, increasing to 2.5 to 4 metres offshore during the afternoon.
Cloudy. Near 100% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm.
Westerly 25 to 30 knots increasing to 30 to 35 knots in the early morning then decreasing to 25 to 30 knots in the morning.
2.5 to 3 metres.
Westerly 4 to 6 metres.
Cloudy. Near 100% chance of showers.
Westerly 20 to 30 knots.
2 to 3 metres.
Southwesterly 5 to 6 metres.
Cloudy. 95% chance of showers.
